api_access.conditions: Stack Exchange API v2.3 available. Requires API key for higher quotas. 300 requests/day unauthenticated, 10000/day with key.

scrape_data.conditions: Content licensed CC BY-SA 4.0. Bulk data available via Stack Exchange Data Dump. Scraping permitted with attribution, subject to rate limits.

allow_training.conditions: Content under CC BY-SA 4.0 license. Training permitted with attribution requirement.
